index.tagline: Multiplayer bingo with friends. Draw numbers, share the link, play together.
index.howItWorks.heading: How it works
index.howItWorks.step1: Host creates a room on the game board and shares the link.
index.howItWorks.step2: Friends open the link and join with their name.
index.howItWorks.step3: Play — host draws numbers, everyone marks their cards.
index.wizard.title: Host or join
index.wizard.body: Host a game to create a room and draw numbers, or join with a link from someone else.
index.lang.label: Language
join.title: Join a Bingabu game
join.hint.code: Ask the host for the 6-letter room code and enter it below.
join.hint.qr: Have a join QR from the host? Scan it.
join.qr.failLoad: QR scanner failed to load. Enter the room code above.
join.qr.noCamera: Camera required to scan. Enter the room code above instead.
spectator.heading: Watching the game
spectator.subtitle: Following the caller — you do not have a card.
spectator.error.missingRoom: Missing room. Go back to join.
spectator.error.needJoin: Enter the room from the join page first (password if required).
player.heading: Your card
player.error.hostSession: Could not verify host session. Use Join as player again from your host tab, or join the game with the room code.
player.booted.title: You were removed from the game
player.booted.body: The host removed you from the room.
bingo.banner.firstVisit.body: First time hosting? Set players, create the room if playing online, then Start the game and use DRAW to call numbers.
bingo.remote.heading: Playing with friends online?
bingo.remote.apiUnavailable: Remote play needs the API. Run npm run dev:api to enable it.
bingo.remote.subtitle: Create an online room to play with others. Optional if you're playing in person.
bingo.remote.howBody: Only the numbers you draw as host count for everyone. Players can only mark cells that match called numbers (plus the free space). If someone disconnects, they should re-open the same link on the same device to reclaim their seat.
bingo.remote.lockLabel: Block new players from taking empty slots
cards.heading: Print cards
cards.subtitle: Same cards as your current game
cards.emptyHtml: No game in progress. Open the Bingabu game and start or load a game, then return here to print the same cards.
privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.body: This page is a placeholder. Replace with your privacy policy, data retention, and contact details before launching publicly.
terms.heading: Terms of use
terms.body: This page is a placeholder. Replace with your terms, acceptable use, and disclaimers before launching publicly.
